package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for goroutine_without_shutdown_path: Looping goroutine literals without an obvious ctx.Done() or done-channel shutdown path.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: concurrency; severity: contextual.
func scenario225Positive(items []string) chan int {
	results := make(chan int)
	for _, item := range items {
		go func() {
			time.Sleep(time.Millisecond)
			results <- len(item)
		}()
	}
	return results
}
